question_text: Sound travels at different speeds through different media. Which statement is correct?

options.label: C
options.text: Sound travels fastest through solid materials like steel

options.label: D
options.text: Sound travels at the same speed in all materials

explanation: Sound travels through solids fastest (about 5000 m/s in steel), then through liquids like water (about 1500 m/s), then slowest through gases like air (about 340 m/s). This is because particles are closer together in solids.
